problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Sleep-dependent. Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
